member.name: T:ContractNonceInfo
member.summary: Info about a contract account's nonce value. A nonce of a contract is only incremented when that contract creates another contract.

member.name: M:ContractNonceInfo.#ctor(ContractId,System.Int64)_2
member.summary: The current value of the contract account's nonce property

member.name: M:ContractNonceInfo.FromBytes(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Extract the contractNonce from a byte array.
member.exception: when there is an issue with the protobuf

member.name: M:ContractNonceInfo.FromProtobuf(Proto.ContractNonceInfo)
member.summary: Extract the contractNonce from the protobuf.
